hero.headline: Free Digital Skills Training — Get a Remote Tech Job
hero.subheadline: Build the tech skills that get you hired. Remotely or anywhere. Free structured training — not a MOOC.
hero.reassurance: No fees · No degree required · Brussels & Antwerp campuses

clusters.name: FLEXIBILITY & REMOTE WORK
clusters.heading: Work flexibility. Tech skills that travel.
clusters.body: Remote jobs are the dominant reason people start learning tech — and for good reason. At 42 Belgium, you build skills that unlock online work, work-from-home roles, and online jobs work from home across Europe. You learn the tools distributed engineering teams actually use, so when you graduate you can apply for remote jobs with confidence.
bullets: Real programming skills for real remote jobs
Tools and workflows used by distributed teams
A portfolio that travels — review it from anywhere
Peer-to-peer collaboration mirroring real tech teams

clusters.name: ACCESSIBLE FREE TRAINING
clusters.heading: Free structured training — not a MOOC.
clusters.body: This is not a free online course you scroll through alone. 42 Belgium is a complete, peer-to-peer training program — free of charge, with physical campuses in Brussels and Antwerp. Unlike free online classes or online courses you start and abandon, here you build projects alongside peers, get real feedback, and finish job-ready. We've designed this for people who value free online courses but want the structure and outcomes a MOOC cannot offer.

clusters.name: LOW BARRIER TO ENTRY
clusters.heading: No CV. No degree. No experience required.
clusters.body: Looking for online jobs with no experience? You're in the right place. 42 Belgium welcomes career changers with zero tech background. No prior degree required. No coding knowledge assumed. Just an online test and your motivation. This is the bridge between where you are and the tech career you want.
bullets: No age limit — adult learners welcome
Pathway to a real career change

faq.question: Is this really free?
faq.answer: Yes. 42 Belgium is 100% free — no tuition, no hidden costs. Our program is funded so that talent, not budget, decides who gets access to tech education.

faq.question: Is this just a MOOC or free online course?
faq.answer: No. Unlike free online courses with or without certificates, 42 is a structured program with physical campuses, peer-to-peer learning, and real projects. You graduate job-ready, not just certified.

faq.question: Can I find remote jobs after graduating?
faq.answer: Many of our graduates land remote jobs. The skills you build — modern programming, team collaboration, project delivery — are exactly what distributed tech teams hire for.

faq.question: I have no tech experience. Can I apply?
faq.answer: Yes. 42 Belgium was designed for online jobs no experience candidates and career changers with zero coding background. Our selection test measures potential, not past knowledge.

faq.question: Do I need a degree?
faq.answer: No. No diploma, no CV required. The only prerequisites are motivation and the willingness to take our online test.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to find your training?
ctaFinal.description: Free structured training. Real remote job opportunities. No degree required. Start with our online test — no experience needed.

course.name: 42 Belgium — Free Digital Skills Training
course.description: Free, peer-to-peer tech training program in Belgium. Build real programming skills and land remote tech jobs — no degree or prior experience required.
